steps.title: Need no increase at voltage
steps.content: The claim is that applying a positive voltage is not by itself enough to increase adhesion. The evidence must show a positive-voltage case with adhesion about the same as the 0 V baseline.

steps.title: Check graph values
steps.content: A misstates the 0 V value. B shows high adhesion at 3 V, which does not prove insufficiency. C compares 2 V to other positive voltages. The remaining option compares 1 V with the 0 V baseline. The answer is D.
